name: cocos-psd-prefab-3x
description: Standalone Cocos Creator 3.8.x editor extension: convert a Photoshop .psd into a 3.x prefab (PNG export + sprite-frame meta + MD5 image dedup + transparent-edge trim), driven by a layer naming convention. Code-friendly output: English names, type prefixes, unique sibling names. 3.8.x port of cocos-psd-prefab-2x.
author: liyu

scripts.test: node test/make_test_psd.js && node psd2prefab.js test/sample.psd --project ../testwork --name Demo3x && node test/verify.js ../testwork
